Q1.query: List all instructors, their department names, and the total credits of the courses they are teaching in the Spring 2024 semester.
Q1.sql: SELECT i.name, i.dept_name, SUM(c.credits) AS total_credits FROM teaches t JOIN instructor i ON t.instructor_name = i.name JOIN course c ON t.course_title = c.title WHERE t.semester = 'Spring' AND t.year = 2024 GROUP BY i.name, i.dept_name;
